guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 11. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_v: Point to the big V and say: vvvvvv. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_j: Now point to the big J and say: jjjjjj.

parent_story: A jelly bear in a glass jar played a small violin. Happy music, happy jar!
